message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. For verification, confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file or your full name.
Neha Verma. I’m still not able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have the account ending in 1184 and the current amount due is 8400. Identity is verified. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I’m unemployed right now and can’t commit to paying.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Understood. I will note unemployment and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I understand, but I still can’t make any payment commitment right now.

Based on what you’ve already said, hardship review is the only live path right now. I’m not pushing a payment commitment. If you want, I can note that you have no income and cannot commit within 21 days for hardship review.
Please note that I’m unemployed and can’t make any payment right now.
Understood. I’m noting unemployment and no current payment capacity. Hardship review is the only live path right now; I’m not pushing a payment commitment.
I’ve already said I can’t pay right now. Please note that and stop asking for a commitment.
Understood. I’m noting no current payment capacity and will not keep asking for a commitment. Based on policy, hardship review is the only live path right now.
